requirement_topic.en: Transport and Shipping — UN 38.3, IEC 62281, Durban Port Transit, SACU Customs, and Overland Delivery to Landlocked Lesotho
requirement_topic.zh: 运输和货运——UN 38.3、IEC 62281、德班港过境、SACU海关及陆运至内陆国莱索托
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸和貨運——UN 38.3、IEC 62281、德班港過境、SACU海關及陸運至內陸國賴索托

summary.en: Lesotho is a landlocked country entirely encircled by South Africa and is a member of the Southern African Customs Union (SACU). All sea freight to Lesotho must transit via South African ports — primarily Durban (Port of Durban), which handles the majority of containerised cargo for the southern African interior. From Durban, cargo travels overland by road through South Africa to Maseru, the capital and primary commercial centre of Lesotho. This two-leg route — international sea freight to Durban followed by South Africa-Lesotho overland transit — creates documentation obligations under both South African and Lesotho customs authorities. Under SACU's common external tariff arrangements, import duties are generally harmonised, but specific import procedures, customs declarations, and any applicable LEWA or Lesotho Trade Ministry authorisations for energy equipment must be confirmed. For lithium battery transport, UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1–T8) for all lithium cells and batteries used in BESS, and a UN 38.3 Test Summary has been mandatory under IATA DGR, IMDG Code, and ADR since January 1, 2020. IEC 62281 (Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries during Transport) provides the complementary international standard for lithium battery transport safety. Both South Africa and Lesotho are subject to international transport conventions for dangerous goods; no country-specific exemption from UN 38.3 applies.
summary.zh: 莱索托是一个完全被南非包围的内陆国，是南部非洲关税同盟（SACU）成员。所有运往莱索托的海运货物必须经由南非港口过境——主要是德班港（德班），该港口处理了南非内陆地区的大多数集装箱货物。从德班，货物经陆路公路穿越南非运至马塞卢，即莱索托首都和主要商业中心。这条两段式路线——国际海运至德班，随后经南非-莱索托陆运过境——在南非和莱索托海关当局下产生文件义务。根据SACU共同对外关税安排，进口关税通常统一，但特定进口程序、海关申报及任何适用的LEWA或莱索托贸易部对能源设备的授权须另行确认。对于锂电池运输，UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了BESS中所有锂电芯和电池的8项强制运输安全测试（T1–T8），UN 38.3测试摘要自2020年1月1日起已根据IATA DGR、IMDG规则和ADR强制要求。IEC 62281（运输中一次和二次锂电芯及电池的安全）提供锂电池运输安全的配套国际标准。南非和莱索托均受危险货物国际运输公约约束；不适用针对UN 38.3的国家专项豁免。
summary.zht: 賴索托是一個完全被南非包圍的內陸國，是南部非洲關稅同盟（SACU）成員。所有運往賴索托的海運貨物必須經由南非港口過境——主要是德班港（德班），該港口處理了南非內陸地區的大多數集裝箱貨物。從德班，貨物經陸路公路穿越南非運至馬塞盧，即賴索托首都和主要商業中心。這條兩段式路線——國際海運至德班，隨後經南非-賴索托陸運過境——在南非和賴索托海關當局下產生文件義務。根據SACU共同對外關稅安排，進口關稅通常統一，但特定進口程序、海關申報及任何適用的LEWA或賴索托貿易部對能源設備的授權須另行確認。對於鋰電池運輸，UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了BESS中所有鋰電芯和電池的8項強制運輸安全測試（T1–T8），UN 38.3測試摘要自2020年1月1日起已根據IATA DGR、IMDG規則和ADR強制要求。IEC 62281（運輸中一次和二次鋰電芯及電池的安全）提供鋰電池運輸安全的配套國際標準。南非和賴索托均受危險貨物國際運輸公約約束；不適用針對UN 38.3的國家專項豁免。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries; Test Summary mandatory since January 1, 2020)
IEC 62281:2019 — Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries during Transport (complementary international standard for lithium battery transport safety)
IMDG Code — International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code (applies to sea freight through Durban port)
ADR — European Agreement Concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road (may apply to overland segment through South Africa depending on carrier classification)
SACU Agreement 2002 — Southern African Customs Union (common external tariff and transit arrangements applicable to Lesotho imports via South Africa)
South Africa Customs and Excise Act 91 of 1964 — governs customs transit procedures through South Africa for goods destined for Lesotho

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. China follows UN Model Regulations and has incorporated UN 38.3 requirements into export customs procedures. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited laboratories including CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, and TÜV Rheinland China. IEC 62281 is also widely applied by Chinese manufacturers for transport safety documentation. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary and IEC 62281 compliance documentation from an accredited laboratory are accepted for the international sea-freight leg of the China-to-Lesotho shipment. The overland segment from Durban to Lesotho requires documentation satisfying South African dangerous goods road transport requirements (which reference ADR or South African equivalents) in addition to standard IMDG sea-freight documentation. The key gap is not standard equivalence but documentation scope, currency, and the additional logistical complexity of the two-leg route via South Africa.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国遵循UN示范法规，并已将UN 38.3要求纳入出口海关程序。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可实验室（包括CAICT、中国UL、中国SGS、中国必维国际检验集团和中国TÜV莱茵）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。IEC 62281也被中国制造商广泛应用于运输安全文件。来自认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要和IEC 62281合规文件适用于中国至莱索托货物的国际海运段。从德班至莱索托的陆运段除标准IMDG海运文件外，还须提供满足南非危险货物公路运输要求（引用ADR或南非等效标准）的文件。主要差距不在于标准等效性，而在于文件范围、时效性以及经南非两段式路线带来的额外物流复杂性。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國遵循UN示範法規，並已將UN 38.3要求納入出口海關程序。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可實驗室（包括CAICT、中國UL、中國SGS、中國必維國際檢驗集團和中國TÜV萊茵）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。IEC 62281也被中國製造商廣泛應用於運輸安全文件。來自認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要和IEC 62281合規文件適用於中國至賴索托貨物的國際海運段。從德班至賴索托的陸運段除標準IMDG海運文件外，還須提供滿足南非危險貨物公路運輸要求（引用ADR或南非等效標準）的文件。主要差距不在於標準等效性，而在於文件範圍、時效性以及經南非兩段式路線帶來的額外物流複雜性。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — accepted for international sea-freight transport if the test summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped
IEC 62281:2019 compliance documentation — widely available from Chinese manufacturers for standard lithium BESS cells and modules

gap.en: The gap for UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 is documentation scope and logistics complexity, not standard equivalence. Both China and Lesotho (via South Africa) operate under the same international transport conventions. Exporters should verify and manage: (a) UN 38.3 test summary coverage — the summary must cover the specific cell model (chemistry, capacity, format, and configuration) being exported; a test summary for a different cell model or capacity is not transferable; any cell design change since the original testing triggers a reassessment; (b) IEC 62281 documentation — confirm that transport safety packaging, labelling, and marking comply with IEC 62281 requirements for the specific BESS cell or battery format being shipped; (c) two-leg route documentation — the China-to-Durban sea-freight leg requires IMDG Code dangerous goods documentation; the Durban-to-Maseru overland leg additionally requires South African customs transit documentation, a South African dangerous goods road transport permit (where applicable under South African regulations), and Lesotho customs import clearance; (d) SACU import procedures — confirm applicable import duties, any energy equipment import authorisations required by LEWA or the Lesotho Trade Ministry, and SACU certificate of origin requirements with a customs broker experienced in South Africa-Lesotho transit; (e) port agent and dangerous goods forwarder — engage a Durban-based freight forwarder with experience handling lithium battery DG cargo transiting to landlocked SACU member states.
gap.zh: UN 38.3和IEC 62281的差距在于文件范围和物流复杂性，而非标准等效性。中国和莱索托（经由南非）均在相同的国际运输公约下运作。出口商应核实和管理：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要覆盖范围——测试摘要须涵盖所出口的特定电芯型号（化学体系、容量、规格和配置）；针对不同电芯型号或容量的测试摘要不可转用；最初测试后的任何电芯设计变更均触发重新评估；（b）IEC 62281文件——确认运输安全包装、标签和标识符合所运输特定BESS电芯或电池规格的IEC 62281要求；（c）两段式路线文件——中国至德班海运段须提供IMDG规则危险货物文件；德班至马塞卢陆运段还须提供南非过境海关文件、南非危险货物公路运输许可（如适用于南非法规）及莱索托海关进口清关；（d）SACU进口程序——向有南非-莱索托过境经验的报关行确认适用进口关税、LEWA或莱索托贸易部可能要求的能源设备进口授权及SACU原产地证书要求；（e）港口代理和危险品货运代理——聘请德班本地、有处理锂电池危险货物中转至SACU内陆国经验的货运代理。
gap.zht: UN 38.3和IEC 62281的差距在於文件範圍和物流複雜性，而非標準等效性。中國和賴索托（經由南非）均在相同的國際運輸公約下運作。出口商應核實和管理：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要覆蓋範圍——測試摘要須涵蓋所出口的特定電芯型號（化學體系、容量、規格和配置）；針對不同電芯型號或容量的測試摘要不可轉用；最初測試後的任何電芯設計變更均觸發重新評估；（b）IEC 62281文件——確認運輸安全包裝、標籤和標識符合所運輸特定BESS電芯或電池規格的IEC 62281要求；（c）兩段式路線文件——中國至德班海運段須提供IMDG規則危險貨物文件；德班至馬塞盧陸運段還須提供南非過境海關文件、南非危險貨物公路運輸許可（如適用於南非法規）及賴索托海關進口清關；（d）SACU進口程序——向有南非-賴索托過境經驗的報關行確認適用進口關稅、LEWA或賴索托貿易部可能要求的能源設備進口授權及SACU原產地證書要求；（e）港口代理和危險品貨運代理——聘請德班本地、有處理鋰電池危險貨物中轉至SACU內陸國經驗的貨運代理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international transport law for all lithium battery imports to Lesotho — UN 38.3 applies universally via South Africa transit under IMDG Code (sea) and ADR-equivalent road transport rules (overland); SACU import procedures apply for final entry into Lesotho
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China; China follows UN Model Regulations and incorporates UN 38.3 into export procedures

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport compliance is universal — a Chinese-origin test summary from an accredited laboratory is accepted for the sea-freight leg to Durban provided it covers the specific cell model and is current. The primary complexity for Lesotho is the two-leg route: international sea freight to Durban (IMDG documentation) followed by overland transit through South Africa (South African dangerous goods road transport documentation and customs transit) to Lesotho (SACU import clearance). Engage a Durban-based freight forwarder with SACU landlocked-transit experience, confirm South African dangerous goods road transport permit requirements, and verify LEWA or Lesotho Trade Ministry import authorisation requirements for BESS energy equipment before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输合规是普遍要求——来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要适用于运往德班的海运段，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。莱索托的主要复杂性在于两段式路线：国际海运至德班（IMDG文件），随后经南非陆运过境（南非危险货物公路运输文件和过境海关）至莱索托（SACU进口清关）。出货前聘请具有SACU内陆国过境经验的德班货运代理，确认南非危险货物公路运输许可要求，并核实LEWA或莱索托贸易部对BESS能源设备的进口授权要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸合規是普遍要求——來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要適用於運往德班的海運段，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。賴索托的主要複雜性在於兩段式路線：國際海運至德班（IMDG文件），隨後經南非陸運過境（南非危險貨物公路運輸文件和過境海關）至賴索托（SACU進口清關）。出貨前聘請具有SACU內陸國過境經驗的德班貨運代理，確認南非危險貨物公路運輸許可要求，並核實LEWA或賴索托貿易部對BESS能源設備的進口授權要求。
